stemHtml: The pilot of an aircraft has submitted a flight plan for a VFR flight and is flying towards an uncontrolled airfield. Should the pilot close the flight plan after arrival to the airfield?

options.a: The aircraft is under flight radar and the flight plan will automatically be closed.
options.b: The pilot should inform the aerodrome operator as soon as possible after landing.
options.c: After landing, the pilot should contact the closest ATS and close their flight plan.
options.d: The flight plan will automatically be closed when landing on an uncontrolled airfield.
